name: PENNANTPARK INVESTMENT CORP
summary: PennantPark Investment Corporation is a Business Development Company (BDC) that invests primarily in first lien secured debt, second lien secured debt, subordinated debt, and equity of privately held middle-market companies. It operates through subsidiaries including SBIC Fund, Taxable Subsidiary, and participates in joint ventures PSLF and PTSF II. It is managed by PennantPark Investment Advisers, LLC and administered by PennantPark Investment Administration, LLC.

products.name: First Lien Secured Debt
products.description: Senior secured loans to middle-market companies.

products.name: Second Lien Secured Debt
products.description: Second priority secured loans to middle-market companies.

products.name: Subordinated Debt
products.description: Subordinated debt investments in middle-market companies.

products.name: Equity Investments
products.description: Equity stakes in privately held middle-market companies.

products.name: PSLF
products.description: PennantPark Senior Loan Fund, LLC, an unconsolidated joint venture.

products.name: PTSF II
products.description: PennantPark-TSO Senior Loan Fund II, LP, an unconsolidated limited partnership.

partnerships.description: Multi-currency amended and restated senior secured revolving credit facility provider.
Prior revolving credit facility provider before deconsolidation of Funding I.
